ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the signal */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the signal was recorded */,
  "delta_freq" REAL /* Change in frequency from the previous data point */,
  "event" INTEGER /* Event type detected in the signal (e.g., 0 for no event, 1 for event) */,
  "power" REAL /* Power level of the signal */,
  "f0" REAL /* Fundamental frequency of the signal */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the signal was sampled */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the signal data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_event FOREIGN KEY ("event") REFERENCES event_types ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES signal_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal source */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the signal source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the signal source (e.g., industrial machinery, biomedical device) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal source */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the signal source */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the signal source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the event type (e.g., critical, warning, info) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal data point being analyzed */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Score indicating the trend of the signal */,
  "anomaly_score" REAL /* Score indicating the presence of an anomaly */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected (if any) */,
  "analysis_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., real-time, batch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_analysis_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal data point that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., critical, warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the alert */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Notes added by the user who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal data point accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user during access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original signal data point */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the signal */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the signal was recorded */,
  "delta_freq" REAL /* Change in frequency from the previous data point */,
  "event" INTEGER /* Event type detected in the signal (e.g., 0 for no event, 1 for event) */,
  "power" REAL /* Power level of the signal */,
  "f0" REAL /* Fundamental frequency of the signal */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "sampling_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the signal was sampled */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the signal data (e.g., good, bad, unknown) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES signal_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., trend analysis, anomaly detection) */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "export_logs" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export log */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal data point being exported */,
  "export_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the export occurred */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "export_destination" TEXT /* Destination of the exported data (e.g., file, database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_export_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of the integration (e.g., API, file-based) */,
  "integration_config" TEXT /* Configuration details for the integration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view signals, edit reports) */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of the permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
